title: ·         Student Correspondence & Admin Tasks: 1 hrs

·         Student Correspondence & Admin Tasks: 1 hrs
Total Extra Compensable Hours (ENG 204): 71 hrs

Additional ENG 101 Work (First Three Weeks)
For the first three weeks of my employment, I took over another ENG 101 section mid-course due to a faculty departure. This required urgent grading, administrative adjustments, and ensuring instructional continuity.
  • Grading & Feedback: ~6 hrs (2 hrs/week × 3 weeks)
  • Administrative & Course Adjustments: ~3 hrs (student support, adapting to the mid-term transition)
Total Additional Hours: 9 hrs
 

  1. Mandatory Trainings & Meetings
context: From document: Dear Dr. Guirguis, — chunk 4 (chunk 4/16)
